chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.35 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case ----------------------------------------------------- 09.02.2026 Syed Ehsan Raza & Mr. Muhammad Farooq Khan, advocates for applicant ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant, after arguing the matter at some length, does no press the instant criminal miscellaneous application and intends to file a Direct Complaint before the competent Court, having jurisdiction, in accordance with law. Order accordingly. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
